summary: iter263 follow-up testing: PurchRec Sprint 1 (3-way match + par-driven auto-PO), deep-dive multi-provider fallback, Schedule v2 live strip. Fixed critical backend bug in resolve_exception endpoint that was creating partial documents. All core features working.

fixed_during_testing.issue: Was creating partial documents with only resolution fields, breaking _list_matches() Pydantic validation
fixed_during_testing.fix: Modified to fetch full match data first, then upsert complete document with resolution fields

fixed_during_testing.issue: Was returning only DB docs OR seed data, not merging them
fixed_during_testing.fix: Now merges DB docs with seed data, using DB version when available

fixed_during_testing.issue: No guard for undefined data.summary causing TypeError
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added null check for data.summary and data.exceptions before rendering

fixed_during_testing.issue: No guard for undefined scan.summary causing potential TypeError
fixed_during_testing.fix: Added null check for scan.summary and scan.suggestions before rendering

backend.notes: 3 failures due to transient 502 errors during long-running deep-dive refresh test (server busy). 1 failure due to test data state (par_levels test ran after upsert test modified data). All endpoints verified working via manual curl tests.

schedule_v2.live_strip_data: EMPLOYEES: 19, SHIFTS: 96, COMPLIANCE FLAGS: 4, TIER MIX: T1:40 T2:40 T3:16

critical_code_review_comments: Backend purchrec_sprint1.py resolve_exception was using upsert=True without full document - fixed
Frontend Sprint1.tsx lacked null guards for API error responses - fixed
seed_data_creation: None - using existing _SEED_MATCHES and _SEED_PAR from purchrec_sprint1.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: PurchRec Sprint 1 is fully functional. The resolve_exception endpoint now properly persists full match documents. The _list_matches() function merges DB data with seed data. Deep-dive uses GPT-4o via fallback chain (Anthropic Sonnet 4.5 may timeout). Schedule v2 live strip shows real-time shift data from /api/echo-schedule/shifts.

mocked_apis.purchrec_sprint1: Uses deterministic _SEED_MATCHES and _SEED_PAR until live ERP/POS feeds are wired
mocked_apis.tech_support_bridge: Still mocked from iter263 first pass

verified_features: GET /api/purchrec/match/{po_id} - returns specific PO match data
POST /api/purchrec/match/resolve - resolves exception and persists full document
GET /api/purchrec/par/levels - returns par levels with outlet filter support
GET /api/purchrec/par/scan - returns suggestions with packs/extended calculations
POST /api/purchrec/par/auto-po - creates draft or submitted POs
GET /api/chronos/deep-dive - returns cached markdown from GPT-4o
GET /api/echo-schedule/shifts - returns shift data for live strip
Frontend PurchRec Sprint 1 panel with Match and Par tabs
Frontend Schedule v2 with Oracle frame and live strip
